prompt: Using the provided reference image, improve the app promo screenshot into a polished, high-end product mockup while preserving the same overall layout, text, phone frame, turquoise app screen, and plant-collection UI. Enlarge and sharpen the phone crop so it fills more of the vertical canvas, keep the headline above it reading Loot with friends. with the small label SHARED COLLECTIONS. Replace the tiny flat plant thumbnails with realistic, larger, photoreal 3D/product-render plants that appear to sit inside the phone screen with soft shadows and depth. Use exactly 4 plants: a monstera in a terracotta pot on the left, a snake plant in a white ribbed pot in the center, a round-leaf striped calathea/peperomia-style plant in a white pot on the right, and a large echeveria succulent in a concrete pot in the lower-left foreground. Keep the UI title House Plants, the close button, menu button, and exactly 3 pill filters labeled “Type Any”, “Light Any”, and “Pot Any”. Make the overall image cleaner, brighter, more premium, with crisp typography, realistic shadows, and a beige/off-white background; avoid adding extra UI elements, extra plants, watermarks, or unrelated text.
